flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Maryville University of Saint Louis rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 ($17.8k → $21.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Maryville University of Saint Louis fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (64.8% → 54.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Maryville University of Saint Louis fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Maryville University of Saint Louis are 33% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($62.1k vs $46.7k).
